name: 18q23_ZADH2_SD
description: 18q23 subtelomeric SD cluster around ZADH2, TSHZ1, and CTDP1. Direct-orientation SD blocks contribute to terminal 18q deletion syndrome breakpoints (de Grouchy syndrome).

architecture.internal_structure: Subtelomeric SD modules of ~10-50 kb at ~94-97% identity around ZADH2, TSHZ1, CTDP1, NFATC1; partial paralog content shared with other subtelomeres.
